summary: OATH's preliminary Fiscal 2026 report confirms this indicator has been getting slower: the average wait for Help Center assistance after an online request roughly doubled year-over-year in the first four months of FY26, even as the Help Center saw a shift in demand toward its text and email/voicemail channels.

sources.label: OATH, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing, with wait times roughly doubling even as demand shifted channels
